interpretation.why_not_complete: This is an index of local report/PPT visual evidence. It records videos, plots, tables, claim levels, and limitations, but it does not create new paper-level closed-loop results or real-robot evidence.

rows.scope: These are aggregate report assets for local task-conditioned proxy rollouts. They do not create official checkpoints, task success/failure rates, paper Fig. 5/Fig. 6 evidence, TensorRT deployment, or real-robot validation.

These are aggregate report assets for local task-conditioned proxy rollouts. They do not create official checkpoints, task success/failure rates, paper Fig. 5/Fig. 6 evidence, TensorRT deployment, or real-robot validation.
PCA projection proxy for local official-importer-export full-bundle VAE posterior means. This is Fig. 5D-adjacent report evidence, not the paper t-SNE panel.
Runs one local official-importer-export IsaacLab closed-loop walk-to-run transition guidance proxy. This is Fig. 5B/5D-adjacent local virtual evidence only.

These assets summarize a local official-loop reference replay over public motions. They are useful for the English report/PPT but do not constitute trained policy evaluation, paper tracking metrics, Fig.5/Fig.6 evidence, TensorRT deployment, or real-robot validation.

Report assets summarize local virtual multiseed checkpoint evaluation. They do not provide official BeyondMimic checkpoints, paper-level tracking metrics, Fig.5/Fig.6 guidance, TensorRT deployment, or real-robot evidence.

These are aggregate report assets for local task-conditioned proxy rollouts. They do not create official checkpoints, task success/failure rates, paper Fig. 5/Fig. 6 evidence, TensorRT deployment, or real-robot validation.

This summarizes current local official-importer-export tracking evidence for reporting. It does not supply official paper checkpoints, DAgger logs, official Fig.5/Fig.6 rollouts, TensorRT deployment, or real robot validation.
The rollout proves a local virtual closed-loop action-guidance bridge, but it does not use the official BeyondMimic diffusion checkpoint or paper task guidance loop.

This is a local virtual full-bundle policy rollout video from a resource-adjusted official-csv-loop PPO checkpoint. It is not unpatched official replay, not paper-level Fig. 5/Fig. 6 guided diffusion, not the paper teacher-policy result, and not real-robot evidence.

This is a local virtual closed-loop guidance rollout using full-bundle public motions and local resource-adjusted PPO/VAE/denoiser checkpoints. It is not the official BeyondMimic diffusion checkpoint, not unpatched official replay, not paper Fig. 5/Fig. 6 task reproduction, not TensorRT deployment, and not real-robot evidence.
